title: [Goal] Command Menu: config-driven structured actions
description:
## Description

## Problem

The command menu dropdown items are hardcoded in CommandMenu.svelte. Each action is an inline DropdownMenu.Item with a bespoke handler. No way to declare actions per mode, no consistent type system, and no separation between action declarations and rendering.

## Solution

A JSON config file (packages/core/command.config.json) declares all command menu actions with metadata: unique id (folder/name format), label, type (default, toggle, submenu), optional hideFrom modes, and separatorBefore. A thin runtime registry (commandActions.js) maps action IDs to handler functions. CommandMenu renders dynamically from the resolved action list.

Action types:
- default: execute handler, close menu (viewfinder, show flow info, reset params, comments sign-in)
- toggle: execute handler, show checkmark state, close menu (hide mode)
- submenu: chevron arrow, opens sub-dropdown (feature flags — replaces current dialog)

Mode scoping: actions in * apply to all modes. Mode-specific arrays add actions for that mode. Individual actions can declare hideFrom to exclude modes.

Dynamic actions (comments) register at runtime via the same registry API.

Configurable footer element (currently: cmd + . to hide).

## Tasks

- [x] **#g010#t01**: Create command.config.json with all current actions declared (id, label, type, hideFrom, separatorBefore)
- [x] **#g010#t02**: Create commandActions.js runtime registry (initCommandActions, registerCommandAction, getActionsForMode, subscribe)
- [x] **#g010#t03**: Register core action handlers for viewfinder, show-flow-info, reset-params, hide-mode, feature-flags
- [x] **#g010#t04**: Refactor CommandMenu to render actions dynamically from registry by type (default items)
- [x] **#g010#t05**: Implement toggle type rendering with CheckboxItem and dynamic label (hide mode)
- [x] **#g010#t06**: Implement submenu type with Sub/SubTrigger/SubContent and chevron (feature flags replaces dialog)
- [x] **#g010#t07**: Implement hideFrom mode filtering using current mode from modeState
- [x] **#g010#t08**: Implement configurable footer from config
- [x] **#g010#t09**: Wire dynamic comment actions into registry at runtime
- [x] **#g010#t10**: Remove feature flags dialog (replaced by submenu sub-dropdown)
- [x] **#g010#t11**: Toggle actions should not close menu (onSelect preventDefault for CheckboxItem)
- [x] **#g010#t12**: Toggle labels should update between states after toggling (resolvedLabel reactivity)
- [x] **#g010#t13**: Rename Workshop menu to Create Menu; define trigger and submenu via config files in a new /configs folder in /core
- [x] **#g010#t14**: Add link action type (URL + label, no handler file needed)
- [x] **#g010#t15**: Align CheckboxItem padding with default Item in dropdown menu so toggle and default actions render consistently
- [x] **#g010#t16**: Replace template select with grouped DropdownMenu (Templates/Recipes headings, opens left, No template default generating blank React component)
- [x] **#g010#t17**: Fix Panel dismissing when clicking nested portaled DropdownMenu (Template selector)
- [x] **#g010#t18**: Disable Panel focus trap so nested portaled DropdownMenu (Template selector) can receive focus and clicks
- [x] **#g010#t19**: Fix DropdownMenu z-index rendering behind Panel (z-50 → z-[10000])
- [x] **#g010#t20**: Move Show flow info, Reset all params, Hide mode into a Devtools submenu in Command Menu (inspect-mode only)
- [x] **#g010#t21**: Fix handleSubmenuChildExecute undefined bug in CommandMenu.svelte for non-toggle submenu children
- [x] **#g010#t22**: Move sidepanel entries into menus config with sidepanel property, register toggle actions, dynamic rendering
- [x] **#g010#t23**: Add per-route excludeRoutes (regex) filtering for menus and actions
- [x] **#g010#t24**: Unify menu rendering order to follow JSON key order (top→bottom = right→left)
- [x] **#g010#t25**: Fix portaled dropdown missing styles: extend core-ui-colors.css tokens to portal selectors, match subcontent to content styling
- [x] **#g010#t26**: Fix missing smooth-corners and bg-popover: sync app tailwind.css with core shadcn theme tokens, utilities, and custom variants
- [x] **#g010#t27**: Add createFlow workshop feature — create new flow data files from the workshop panel

---
